column2: Verify that an admin can update a custom field from the Config page
column3:
1. Login to admin.fctf.site as an admin.
2. Open the Config page and navigate to Fields.
3. Select an existing custom field.
4. Update the field name and description.
5. Save the changes.
6. Open a user edit form and review the updated field.
column4:
- The custom field update succeeds.
- The updated name and description appear in the Config page.
- The updated field name appears in the user edit form.
- The field remains usable after the update.
column5:
- Admin is logged in to admin.fctf.site.
- At least 1 editable custom field exists.
- The admin can access both the Config page and a user edit form.
